FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL STG_CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL,
 (
 select REQUEST_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL
 minus
 select REQUEST_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.REQUEST_ID = STG_CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL.REQUEST_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_RA_CM_REQUESTS_ALL)
